brief_notes: Strong integrative study combining computational (Rosetta) and experimental (cell-based, biochemical) approaches to systematically define POP target specificities. The paper effectively overturns a prevailing model about POP1-ASC interaction with converging evidence. Tables are well-structured and the comprehensive summary table is particularly useful. The comparison between POPs and COPs adds conceptual depth. Weaknesses include qualitative IC50 descriptions in the FRET data and the absence of actual Rosetta energy values in favor of categorical descriptors. Methods are detailed and reproducible.
